name: Uno Wallet
long_description:
Uno is building an AI-powered wallet for everyday spending. We start at checkout: Uno automatically selects the best credit card for each purchase based on merchant category, card rewards, and spending patterns, so users earn more points, miles, and cashback without thinking about it.

Today, people either guess which card to use or manually juggle rewards categories. Uno turns that decision into an invisible automation. Over time, Uno becomes the financial agent in your pocket: optimizing which card to tap, which cards to apply for, when bills are due, and other everyday money decisions.
one_liner: The AI wallet that picks the best card at checkout.
